source_filing: Johnson & Johnson Form 10-K (fiscal year ended December 28, 2025)
original_text: The Company believes that its operations comply in all material respects with applicable environmental laws and regulations.
modified_text: The Company's operations comply in all material respects with applicable environmental laws and regulations.
claim: Johnson & Johnson's operations comply in all material respects with applicable environmental laws and regulations.

notes: Source hedges with 'The Company believes that'; modified text strips the belief qualifier and asserts compliance as flat present fact. Otherwise verbatim.
